race.description: Qlds Finest Rum - The Bundaberg Rum Hcp (Bm65)
race.comment: PYROLYSIS (6) produced a reasonable effort after being in contention on the bend to finish 2.5 lengths away in fifth last start over 1110m at Doomben. That followed a first-up win at Eagle Farm. Ready to peak now third-up and has the class to figure prominently. SEAMS LOGICAL (2) was a winner over this journey at Toowoomba last start, making it 4 wins from 8 starts. Rates well and with the claim offsetting the bigger weight is expected to go close again. ODE TO BEAUTY (10) turned things around last start and scored by half a length over 1000m at this track. Include. The best efforts of METAL MAN (4) have come when fresh and he should be ready to go off a nice trial.
